examples: It is grossly unfair to impute blame to the United Nations.
Blessed is the man to whom the Lord will not impute sin.
Let us, then, impute to the fatality of things alone these formidable collisions.
Taking the 10-year Treasury at face value, one would also impute that the market hardly expects any inflation.
But once we have a story in mind, it's easy to find evidence and impute connections to confirm it.
